title: CHILD WELFARE INFORMATION GATEWAY - 211info
text: UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES CHILD WELFARE INFORMATION GATEWAY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information on topics such as child welfare, child abuse and neglect, out-of-home care, and adoption. 200 Independence Avenue SW Washington, DC 20201 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (800) 394-3366 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 394-3366 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Specialized Information and Referral * Adoption/Foster Care/Kinship Care Issues Specialized Information and Referral * Child Abuse Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INFORMATION SERVICES - OFFICE OF CIVIL RIGHTS LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - STOPBULLYING.GOV SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - COVID-19 THERAPEUTICS LOCATOR If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNITED STATES DEPARTMENT OF HEALTH AND HUMAN SERVICES
